input: customer support: app keeps showing white screen
output: I apologize for the trouble. This may be due to a temporary glitch. Please force close the app and relaunch it.

input: customer support: website takes too long to open
output: Sorry for the delay. Our servers are experiencing high traffic. We are working to improve load times.

input: customer support: unable to complete login process
output: I understand the inconvenience. Please try resetting your password or using a different browser.

input: customer support: order page is not loading
output: We regret the issue. Please clear your browser cache and try again after a few minutes.

input: customer support: app stuck on loading screen
output: Sorry about that. Please update the app to the latest version and restart your device.

input: customer support: site showing error 502
output: I apologize for the server error. Our tech team is already working to bring the site back online.

input: customer support: checkout page freezes
output: I understand the frustration. Please try accessing the checkout from a different device or incognito mode.

input: customer support: app logs me out automatically
output: Sorry for the issue. Please update your app and re-login. If it persists, reinstall the app.

input: customer support: mobile site not scrolling
output: We are sorry for the glitch. Please refresh the page or try using our app instead.

input: customer support: payment gateway not opening
output: I apologize for the trouble. This may be a temporary bank server issue. Please retry after a while.

input: customer support: login verification code not received
output: I understand the difficulty. Please check your spam folder and ensure your mobile number is active.

input: customer support: app crashes on iPhone
output: Sorry for the crash. Please update iOS and the app. If problem persists, reinstall it.

input: customer support: website keeps redirecting me
output: We are sorry for the redirect loop. Please clear site data for our domain and try again.

input: customer support: image upload not working in app
output: I apologize for the glitch. Please check app permissions and ensure the image size is under 5 MB.

input: customer support: product page images not showing
output: Sorry for the inconvenience. Slow connection might cause this. Please reload the page or switch to Wi-Fi.

input: customer support: live chat button not responding
output: I apologize. Please refresh the page or contact us via email support while we fix the chat widget.

input: customer support: sign-up form not submitting
output: Sorry for the issue. Please ensure all mandatory fields are filled and try again in a few minutes.

input: customer support: app not installing on Android
output: I understand the problem. Please check your device storage and allow installation from unknown sources if needed.

input: customer support: browser crashed during payment
output: I am sorry for the crash. Please check if the payment was deducted before retrying. Contact us if double charged.

input: customer support: account locked after multiple attempts
output: For security reasons your account is temporarily locked. Please wait 30 minutes or reset your password.

input: customer support: payment deducted but order not confirmed
output: I apologize for the inconvenience. The amount will be auto-refunded if order failed. Please allow 2 hours.

input: customer support: UPI transaction failed but amount debited
output: Sorry about that. Banks usually reverse such debits within 48 hours. You can also share the UPI reference ID.

input: customer support: card charged but payment failed on site
output: I understand your concern. It’s a pending authorization that will be reversed by your bank within 5-7 days.

input: customer support: coupon applied but discount not showing
output: I am sorry for the issue. Please double-check if the coupon meets minimum order value and is still active.

input: customer support: unable to add new card for payment
output: We apologize for the trouble. Please ensure the card supports online transactions and try again in a few minutes.

input: customer support: wallet money deducted twice
output: Sorry for the duplicate debit. Share your wallet transaction ID and we will raise a refund request immediately.

input: customer support: refund amount less than original payment
output: I apologize for the discrepancy. Please share the order ID so our billing team can verify the calculation.

input: customer support: paid via netbanking but order didn't go through
output: I understand the concern. The amount will bounce back to your account within 3 business days automatically.

input: customer support: international payment declined
output: Sorry for the decline. Your bank may be blocking the transaction. Please enable international usage or try a different card.

input: customer support: EMI option not visible at checkout
output: I apologize for the inconvenience. EMI may not be available for some items. Please check eligible products or contact your bank.

input: customer support: cash on delivery not available for my pincode
output: I understand. Cash on delivery availability depends on the delivery location. You can try prepaid instead.

input: customer support: order amount deducted but still showing pending
output: We regret the delay. The payment may be under verification. It usually reflects within 30 minutes.

input: customer support: bank offer not reflected in final price
output: I apologize. Please check if you have applied the offer correctly at the payment step using the specific bank card.

input: customer support: payment stuck after OTP verification
output: Sorry for the issue. This may be due to connectivity. Close the session and attempt the payment after 10 minutes.

input: customer support: refund processed but showing wrong bank account
output: I understand the confusion. Please share the transaction details and we will correct the account information.

input: customer support: multiple orders placed, need to cancel one
output: I see the concern. You can cancel the unwanted order from the 'My Orders' section before it is shipped.

input: customer support: payment method changed after placing order
output: Once the order is placed the payment method cannot be changed. If you need help cancel and reorder.

input: customer support: card saving failed on my account
output: Sorry for the issue. Please try after clearing cache or ensure your card has no restrictions for online saves.

input: customer support: promo code valid but not applying
output: I apologize for the trouble. Please check the code’s terms, such as minimum purchase or category restrictions.

input: customer support: prepaid order cancelled but refund delayed
output: I understand your concern. Refunds for cancelled prepaid orders are usually processed within 5-7 days.

input: customer support: order is delayed beyond delivery date
output: I apologize for the delay. Let me check the current status of your shipment. Please share your order ID.

input: customer support: tracking number not showing any update
output: Sometimes tracking takes 24-48 hours to update. If the problem persists please contact the courier partner.

input: customer support: delivery person marked delivered but I didn't receive
output: I am sorry for the issue. Please share your order ID so we can raise a non-delivery complaint immediately.

input: customer support: wrong delivery address entered
output: I understand the problem. Address change is possible only before shipment. Please contact support team quickly.

input: customer support: order split into multiple packages
output: Yes, sometimes items from different sellers ship separately. You will receive tracking details for each package.

input: customer support: can I change delivery slot
output: Once the slot is booked it cannot be changed. You may contact the delivery partner after it is out for delivery.

input: customer support: missing item in my package
output: I sincerely apologize. Share your unboxing video and order ID to help us investigate and send the missing item.

input: customer support: package received in open condition
output: I am sorry for this experience. Please share images of the package and we will assist you with a return or refund.

input: customer support: order status stuck at 'processing'
output: We apologize for the delay. Processing can take up to 48 hours during high demand. The status will update soon.

input: customer support: delivery attempted but I was unavailable
output: No worries. The courier will attempt delivery again within the next 1-2 days.

input: customer support: ship to a different address after ordering
output: Unfortunately the shipping address cannot be edited once confirmed. You can cancel and reorder.

input: customer support: how long will it take to deliver to my pincode
output: Delivery time varies by location. Please share your pincode and I will check the estimated delivery date for you.

input: customer support: received wrong product
output: I apologize for the mix-up. We will arrange a return and dispatch the correct item immediately.

input: customer support: product is different from website description
output: Sorry for the discrepancy. You can request a return or exchange within the eligible period.

input: customer support: exchanged item also has defect
output: We deeply regret this. Please share the exchange details so we can provide a full refund or another replacement.

input: customer support: size chart seems inaccurate
output: I understand your frustration. If the size does not match you are eligible for an exchange within 7 days.

input: customer support: exchange pick-up scheduled but nobody arrived
output: I apologize for the missed pickup. I will escalate this and the courier will attempt again within 24 hours.

input: customer support: need to replace a item with higher price
output: You can request a return and place a fresh order for the higher-priced item. Exchange is only for same or lower value.

input: customer support: exchange window expired by one day
output: I understand the concern. As a one-time exception we might consider the request. Please share your order ID.

input: customer support: can I return a gift item
output: Gift items can be returned provided you have the order number and it is within the return period.

input: customer support: product seal broken received
output: I apologize. Items with broken seals are eligible for immediate return. Please share images for prompt assistance.

input: customer support: want to exchange for different brand
output: Exchanges are limited to the same product or different size/color. To change the brand, please return and order new.

input: customer support: return request declined without reason
output: I'm sorry for the confusion. Let me check the reason why your return was rejected and we can re-evaluate it.

input: customer support: exchange item out of stock
output: If the desired size or color is unavailable we can process a refund instead. Would you prefer that?

input: customer support: return pickup not available in my area
output: I apologize. If pick-up is unavailable, you can self-ship the product and we will reimburse the courier charges.

input: customer support: quality issue after first wash
output: I am sorry for the quality problem. Please share photos and we will proceed with a refund or exchange.

input: customer support: received duplicate product instead of my order
output: We apologize for the error. Please share your order ID and we will rectify this at the earliest.

input: customer support: item arrived late so I no longer need it
output: You can refuse delivery or initiate a return request. Late delivery may be eligible for full refund.

input: customer support: packaging was damaged but product okay
output: Thank you for informing us. If the product is undamaged you are still covered by warranty. We will note this feedback.

input: customer support: refund status showing 'completed' but money not credited
output: I understand. Once marked completed, it may take 2-3 business days for the bank to reflect it. If not, please share the transaction ID.

input: customer support: refund credited to closed bank account
output: We regret the issue. Our payment team can trace the refund and reissue it to your active account. Please share the order ID.

input: customer support: partial refund received but full refund expected
output: I apologize. Please share the order details so we can check if any charges like shipping were deducted.

input: customer support: refund to credit card not showing
output: Credit card refunds may take up to 10 business days to appear. Please check your statement after that period.

input: customer support: refund for cancelled order is less than paid
output: I understand the mismatch. Possibly a cancellation fee applied. Let me check the order and clarify.

input: customer support: refund request raised but not yet picked up
output: Refund processing starts after the item is received. Please wait for the pick-up and return completion.

input: customer support: refund not initiated even after product returned
output: I am sorry for the delay. Once warehouse checks the returned item the refund is initiated. This may take 3-5 days.

input: customer support: wallet refund not usable
output: Wallet refunds are usually added as credits you can use for next purchase. If you prefer bank transfer, let us know.

input: customer support: refund status stuck at 'requested'
output: We apologize for the hold-up. I will escalate your request to the refunds team for faster processing.

input: customer support: product delivered but no refund for returned item
output: I understand your concern. If the return was completed, refund should be initiated. Let me verify the return status.

input: customer support: compensation for delayed refund
output: We can look into compensation on a case-by-case basis. Please share your order ID and our team will review.

input: customer support: UPI refund reference not shared
output: Sorry for the oversight. I will request the UPI reference ID from the finance team and share it with you.

input: customer support: refund mode changed without my consent
output: Refunds are processed to the original payment method by default. If it changed, please share details for investigation.

input: customer support: account creation issue with email
output: I can help. Please try using a different email or check if your email is already registered. Reset password if needed.

input: customer support: not getting order confirmation email
output: Please check your spam or promotions folder. Also ensure your email address was entered correctly during checkout.

input: customer support: how to delete my account
output: We’re sorry to see you go. You can request account deletion by contacting our support team via email.

input: customer support: mobile number update not working
output: Sorry for the issue. Mobile number change may require OTP verification. Please try the process again.

input: customer support: notifications not working in app
output: Please check app notification settings on your device and within the app. Reinstalling can also resolve this.

input: customer support: wishlist items disappearing
output: I apologize. This can happen after clearing cache. Please stay logged in and re-add your favorites.

input: customer support: store locator not working
output: Sorry for the trouble. Please ensure location permission is enabled for the app or website.

input: customer support: feedback form not submitting
output: We regret the issue. You can email your feedback to support@example.com. We value your input.

input: customer support: loyalty points not credited
output: Points are credited after order delivery. If it’s been more than 7 days, please share your order ID.

input: customer support: can I change my registered email address
output: Yes, you can change it from account settings after verifying the new email. Contact support if you face difficulties.

input: customer support: how to enable two-factor authentication
output: Two-factor authentication can be enabled from the security section in your account settings.

input: customer support: referral code not working for friend
output: Please ensure your friend is a new user and meets the referral conditions. Sharing the correct link also helps.

input: customer support: seller not responding to query
output: I will step in and help. Please share the product and order ID so I can coordinate with the seller.

input: customer support: invoice download not working
output: Sorry for the inconvenience. You can try from the orders section. If the issue persists, we can email the invoice.

input: customer support: how to apply for a business account
output: Thank you for your interest. Business accounts are currently by invitation. Please reach out to corporate sales.

input: customer support: product warranty claim process
output: For warranty claims, visit the order details page and select 'Claim Warranty'. We will guide you through the rest.

input: customer support: how to cancel order before shipping
output: You can cancel from 'My Orders' within a few minutes of placing. If the option is gone, it's already processing.

input: customer support: order placed but I want to change size
output: Size cannot be edited after order. Please cancel if still possible and place a new order with the correct size.

input: customer support: will I get refund if I cancel
output: Yes, if cancelled before dispatch a full refund is initiated. After shipment, return policy applies.

input: customer support: how to contact delivery partner
output: The contact details of the courier partner are available in the tracking page of your order.

input: customer support: can I add items to an already placed order
output: Unfortunately once an order is placed you cannot add items. You can place a new order for additional items.

input: customer support: delivery to multiple addresses in one order
output: Our platform does not support multiple addresses in a single order. Please place separate orders.

input: customer support: how to report a seller
output: You can use the 'Report seller' option on the product page. Our team will investigate and take action.

input: customer support: is this product authentic
output: We ensure products are sourced from authorized sellers. If you have doubts, you can request a certificate of authenticity.

input: customer support: product price dropped after I ordered
output: I understand. We do have price protection for some items. Please share the order ID to check eligibility.

input: customer support: unable to apply gift card
output: Please check the gift card balance and expiry. If it's still valid, try entering the code without spaces.

input: customer support: how to avail no-cost EMI
output: Select a product eligible for EMI, choose your card at payment and select the no-cost EMI tenure.

input: customer support: payment confirmation but order not showing in history
output: Sometimes it takes a few minutes to sync. If it doesn't appear within an hour, please contact support with payment ID.

input: customer support: what does 'fulfilled by seller' mean
output: It means the item is packed and shipped directly by the seller, not from our warehouse.

input: customer support: I want to buy in bulk
output: For bulk orders please contact our business sales team. We may offer special pricing.

input: customer support: how long does exchange take
output: Exchange typically takes 5-7 business days from the date the returned item is picked up.

input: customer support: can I opt for open box delivery
output: Open box delivery is available for select items and pincodes. You will see the option at checkout.

input: customer support: secure packaging fee charged
output: This is an optional fee for fragile items. It can be toggled off before placing the order.

input: customer support: product out of stock after adding to cart
output: I apologize. Items are reserved only after order confirmation. I can notify you when it's back in stock.

input: customer support: my review is not published
output: Reviews go through moderation and may take up to 72 hours. If it meets guidelines it will be published.

input: customer support: how to track return pickup
output: You can track return pickup from the 'Returns' section under 'My Orders' using the provided tracking ID.

input: customer support: UPI payment failed but money debited
output: The amount is usually reversed within 2-3 days. If not, please share your transaction reference number.

input: customer support: debit card not supported
output: We accept major debit cards. Please check if your card is enabled for e-commerce. You can also try netbanking.

input: customer support: I want to cancel my subscription
output: Subscriptions can be cancelled from account settings. If you face issues, reach out to our membership team.

input: customer support: return pickup rescheduled automatically
output: Sometimes courier partners reschedule. You can choose a convenient slot again from the returns page.

input: customer support: wrong currency shown on website
output: Please ensure your location setting is correct. Go to settings and change country/currency to your region.

input: customer support: how to use reward points
output: At checkout, you'll see an option to redeem your reward points for a discount. Click to apply.

input: customer support: app draining battery quickly
output: We apologize. The new update is optimized for performance. Please ensure you have the latest version installed.

input: customer support: I received a call asking for OTP
output: Please do not share OTPs. We never ask for them via call. Report such calls to our safety team.

input: customer support: suspicious login attempt on my account
output: Your account security is important. Please change your password immediately and enable two-factor authentication.

input: customer support: I need invoice with GST
output: A GST invoice can be downloaded from your order history after delivery. Ensure your GSTIN is updated in addresses.

input: customer support: product warranty registration
output: Some products require registration on the brand's website. Check the warranty card for instructions.

input: customer support: app not compatible with my device
output: I apologize. Please check the minimum OS requirements. You can also use our mobile website as an alternative.

input: customer support: search bar not working
output: Sorry for the trouble. Try clearing browser cache or updating the app. The issue should resolve shortly.

input: customer support: I forgot my password
output: No problem. Use the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page to reset it via email or SMS.

input: customer support: unable to verify phone number
output: I understand the issue. Ensure you entered the correct number with country code and try the OTP again.

input: customer support: how to return a product
output: Go to 'My Orders', select the item and click 'Return'. Follow the steps and schedule a pickup.

input: customer support: delivery charge too high
output: I understand your concern. Delivery charges depend on location and order value. Free delivery is available above a certain amount.

input: customer support: can I change payment mode after order
output: Once an order is placed the payment mode cannot be changed. You can cancel and reorder with preferred mode.

input: customer support: I missed the delivery today
output: Don't worry. The courier will reattempt delivery on the next business day. You can also reschedule via tracking.

input: customer support: why is my account temporarily blocked
output: This could be due to multiple failed login attempts or suspicious activity. Please contact support to unlock it.

input: customer support: refund for damaged product
output: I apologize. For a damaged product you are eligible for a full refund or replacement. Please share images.

input: customer support: how to track my order
output: You can track your order from the 'My Orders' section using the tracking link sent via email/SMS.

input: customer support: wrong item delivered
output: I'm sorry for the mistake. Please share your order ID and we will arrange the correct delivery or refund.

input: customer support: partial order received
output: Your order might be split into multiple shipments. Please check your email for other tracking numbers.

input: customer support: I want to exchange for larger size
output: Sure! Initiate an exchange from 'My Orders' and select the larger size if available.

input: customer support: I can't apply a coupon
output: Please check whether the coupon terms are met (minimum order, specific category, new user only).

input: customer support: how to cancel a return request
output: If the return pickup hasn't happened yet, you can cancel it from the 'Returns' section.

input: customer support: not happy with product quality
output: I'm sorry about that. You can return the product within the return window for a refund or exchange.

input: customer support: can I modify delivery address
output: Address change is possible only before the item is shipped. Afterwards it's very limited.

input: customer support: how long is the exchange window
output: Most products have a 7-day exchange window from the date of delivery. Check the product page for specifics.

input: customer support: I want to speak to a human
output: I understand. I can escalate your issue to a live agent. Please share your concern and order ID.

input: customer support: are there any hidden charges
output: The final amount at checkout includes all taxes and fees. There are no hidden charges.

input: customer support: how to return a heavy item
output: For large or heavy items, special logistics will be arranged. Please initiate the return and our team will guide.

input: customer support: order cancelled by seller
output: We apologize for the inconvenience. If the seller cancels, a full refund is automatically initiated.

input: customer support: I want a call back
output: Sure, I have raised a callback request. Our support team will contact you within 2 hours.

input: customer support: how to delete address from my account
output: Go to 'Saved Addresses' in your account settings, select the address and click delete.

input: customer support: I want to change my order from COD to prepaid
output: Unfortunately you cannot switch payment mode after placing. Please cancel and place a new prepaid order.

input: customer support: wallet balance not updated after top-up
output: If it's been more than 30 minutes please share the top-up transaction ID. We'll manually reconcile it.

input: customer support: order delivered but quality bad
output: I'm sorry to hear that. You can return the product as quality not satisfactory within the policy period.

input: customer support: why do I need to submit ID for return
output: ID verification is sometimes required to prevent fraud on high-value returns. It is safe and secure.

input: customer support: how to get invoice for my order
output: Invoice can be downloaded from the order details page after delivery. You'll see a 'Download Invoice' option.

input: customer support: product is missing parts
output: I apologize. Missing parts are covered. Please share images and the part details for a replacement/refund.

input: customer support: can I extend the return window
output: Return windows are generally strict, but in special situations we can review. Please share your order ID.

input: customer support: payment page keeps loading
output: Sorry for the wait. This might be a network issue. Try a different browser or payment method.

input: customer support: I received a used product
output: That's unacceptable. We will initiate a return and full refund. Please share images and order details.

input: customer support: how to add more than one shipping address
output: You can add multiple addresses in your account address book, then choose one at checkout.

input: customer support: my order was delivered to wrong house
output: I'm very sorry for this. We'll launch an investigation and arrange a replacement or refund immediately.

input: customer support: I want to cancel an exchange request
output: If the pickup hasn't happened yet you can cancel the exchange from the returns section of the order.

input: customer support: I was charged for cancelled item
output: The charge should have been reversed. If it still shows, please share your order ID for a refund check.

input: customer support: app shows 'under maintenance'
output: We apologize for the downtime. Maintenance usually lasts a few hours. Please try again later.

input: customer support: how to reorder
output: You can reorder from your order history. Look for the 'Buy Again' button next to the product.

input: customer support: can I track order without account
output: You'll need the order ID and email/phone used. Use the guest tracking option on our website.

input: customer support: wrong price shown in cart
output: Please refresh and try again. If the issue persists, share the product name and we'll check the pricing.

input: customer support: how to report a fake product
output: Please contact support immediately with the order ID and photos. We take counterfeits very seriously.

input: customer support: delivery boy asking for extra cash
output: Do not pay extra. Cash on delivery amount is final. Report such incidents with order ID for action.

input: customer support: exchange delivered but size still wrong
output: We apologize for the repeat error. Please contact us for a full refund and we'll ensure this is investigated.

input: customer support: can I get a paper bill
output: Paper bills are included in the package. If missing, the digital invoice from the website is equally valid.

input: customer support: why was my review removed
output: Reviews may be removed if they violate guidelines. If you think this was a mistake, contact review moderation.

input: customer support: I cannot pay via UPI
output: Try reinitiating the UPI payment. Ensure your UPI app is updated and the bank servers are active.

input: customer support: I want to return a personalized item
output: Personalized or custom items are usually not returnable unless defective. Please check the policy on product page.

input: customer support: how to earn loyalty points faster
output: You can earn points by writing reviews, referring friends, or shopping during special bonus point events.

input: customer support: I received a call about order cancellation
output: Beware of scams. We never call to ask for OTP or bank details to cancel orders. Report such calls.

input: customer support: what is shipping policy for international orders
output: International shipping depends on the product and destination. Duties and taxes may apply. See our shipping policy.

input: customer support: my order arrived late and I was charged for it anyway
output: Late delivery beyond the promised date might be eligible for compensation. Please share your order ID.

input: customer support: I want to change delivery date
output: If the order hasn't shipped you can try contacting support. After shipment, you may coordinate with courier.

input: customer support: why does my invoice show different amount
output: Sometimes discounts and promotions adjust the invoice total. If the mismatch is large, we can verify.

input: customer support: my gift card got locked
output: Gift cards may lock after multiple invalid attempts. Please contact support with the card number to unlock.

input: customer support: I returned an item but tracking shows not picked up
output: If you handed it over, keep the pickup receipt. Contact support and we'll track the return manually.

input: customer support: how to opt out of marketing emails
output: You can unsubscribe using the link at the bottom of our emails or from notification preferences in account.

input: customer support: I need a duplicate copy of warranty card
output: Warranty information is usually linked to your order. Physical card may not be reissued. Use invoice as proof.

input: customer support: chat not connecting to agent
output: I apologize for the delay. The chat is experiencing high volume. Please wait or try again after some time.

input: customer support: app is very slow today
output: We are sorry for the performance issues. Our team is scaling up resources. It should improve soon.

input: customer support: what does open box delivery mean
output: It means the delivery person opens the package in front of you for inspection before marking as delivered.

input: customer support: my account shows order I didn't place
output: This might be a security concern. Please change your password immediately and contact support to investigate.

input: customer support: how to check gift card balance
output: Go to the gift card section in your account and enter the card number and PIN to check balance.

input: customer support: can I extend my subscription
output: Yes, you can extend or renew your subscription from the membership page before expiry.

input: customer support: I accidentally confirmed delivery but haven't received
output: Please contact support immediately with the order ID so we can raise a dispute with the courier.

input: customer support: what is estimated delivery for pre-orders
output: Pre-order items show an estimated shipping date on the product page. You will be notified when shipped.

input: customer support: can I return an opened electronic item
output: Electronics can be returned if defective or not as described, even if opened. Check specific policy.

input: customer support: my return pickup was cancelled
output: I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Please reschedule the pickup from the returns page at your convenience.

input: customer support: can I change the phone number for delivery
output: Phone number cannot be changed after order, but you can add delivery instructions with alternate contact.

input: customer support: order not placed but money deducted
output: We understand the worry. The amount is pending and will be reversed within 3-5 days automatically.

input: customer support: app requires too many permissions
output: Permissions like camera and storage are needed for features like image upload. You can manage them in settings.

input: customer support: I am unable to post a review
output: Ensure you are logged in and have purchased the item. Some products may have review moderation delay.

input: customer support: how to share my feedback
output: We value your feedback! You can rate the app, fill the feedback form, or email us at support@example.com.

input: customer support: how to return a product bought on sale
output: Sale items follow the same return policy unless tagged as non-returnable. Check the product page.

input: customer support: I need a refund for poor quality food item
output: Sorry about that. For food or perishables, please contact support within 24 hours with photos for a refund.

input: customer support: how to become a seller
output: You can apply by visiting our 'Sell on platform' page and filling out the registration form.

input: customer support: can I use two coupons at once
output: Usually only one coupon code is allowed per order. Check the terms of each coupon for details.

input: customer support: I received an empty box
output: This is very serious. Share an unboxing video and order ID so we can launch a full investigation and refund.

input: customer support: product has scratch but box ok
output: We apologize. That's likely a manufacturing defect. You can exchange or return it for a refund.

input: customer support: I want to gift wrap my order
output: Gift wrap option appears at the cart or checkout page for eligible items with an additional fee.

input: customer support: can I pause my order
output: Orders cannot be paused once placed. You may cancel if still possible and reorder later.

input: customer support: how to check delivery guy's identity
output: Delivery partners carry ID cards. If unsure, call our customer care to confirm the person's identity.

input: customer support: payment successful but order cancelled
output: If the payment went through but order cancelled, refund is automatically initiated. Please allow 5-7 days.

input: customer support: please cancel my order immediately
output: I'll try, but cancelation is only possible within a few minutes after placing. Please share your order ID.

input: customer support: how to change email for newsletter
output: Update your email in account settings and resubscribe to the newsletter from the communication preferences.

input: customer support: I want to extend my replacement warranty
output: Replacement warranty is standard. For extended warranty, check if the product offers separate brand warranty.

input: customer support: my COD order delivery attempted but no cash
output: You can pay via card or UPI at the doorstep if you don't have cash. Ask the delivery person for options.

input: customer support: app is not compatible with tablet
output: Our app is optimized for phones. Please use the mobile website on your tablet for a better experience.

input: customer support: I want to know the status of my complaint
output: Please provide your complaint reference number, and I'll check the latest update for you.

input: customer support: wrong user name on account
output: You can edit your profile name from the account settings. If it doesn't allow, contact support.

input: customer support: how to delete payment method
output: In your account, go to Saved Cards/Wallets and remove the payment method you no longer need.

input: customer support: I received a product I didn't order
output: Sounds like a shipping error. Please share your order ID and we'll arrange return of the extra item.

input: customer support: can I exchange an item without original packaging
output: Original packaging is preferred but not always mandatory. The product must be in good condition. Try initiating exchange.

input: customer support: how to get cashback
output: Cashback offers are visible on product pages. After order you'll receive cashback as per terms in your account.

input: customer support: delivery refused and refund not started
output: Refused delivery is treated as return. Refund initiates after package reaches back to warehouse.

input: customer support: I can't see my ordered items after login
output: Please ensure you logged in with the same email or phone used during checkout. Guest orders won't show in account.

input: customer support: screen flickering on app
output: Sorry for the issue. Could be a display compatibility problem. Please try lowering refresh rate in device settings.

input: customer support: my wallet cashback expired
output: Cashback credits have an expiry. You can check the validity in the wallet section. Expired credits cannot be reinstated.

input: customer support: want to order a missing part for product
output: We can help if the part is sold separately. Please share the product model and missing part details.

input: customer support: how do I use a gift card
output: Enter the gift card code and PIN at the payment step. The amount will be deducted from your total.

input: customer support: product is smaller than expected
output: I understand. If the size doesn't match the description, you can return or exchange it within policy.

input: customer support: how to get my refund as cash
output: Refunds for prepaid orders are returned to the original payment source. COD refunds can be to bank account.

input: customer support: I want a different model exchange
output: Exchanging for a different model is not supported. You'll need to return the current item and place a new order.

input: customer support: my order is late for a birthday gift
output: I'm really sorry about the timing. If the delivery date was guaranteed and missed, we can offer compensation.

input: customer support: how to participate in flash sale
output: Flash sales are time-bound. Add the item to your wishlist and be on the app at the sale start time to grab it.

input: customer support: product color looks different from picture
output: Slight color variations can occur due to screen settings. If it's significantly different, you can return it.

input: customer support: I can't rate a product
output: Rating option appears after delivery. Please make sure you are logged in and have purchased the item.

input: customer support: where is my nearest pickup store
output: Our store locator under 'Help' shows nearby pickup points. You can also select a store during checkout.

input: customer support: I accidentally removed item from cart
output: No worries. You can search the product again and add it back, or check your recently viewed items.

input: customer support: do you price match
output: We do not offer price matching currently. However, keep an eye on our deals for the best prices.

input: customer support: can you hold an item for me
output: We cannot reserve stock. It is available as long as it's in the cart, until stock runs out or you checkout.

input: customer support: how to remove an item from wishlist
output: Go to your wishlist, find the item and click the remove icon. It will be deleted immediately.

input: customer support: I didn't get my Cash on Delivery change
output: Delivery persons should carry change. If they didn't, please report with order ID and we'll investigate.

input: customer support: app draining data
output: We're optimizing data usage. Please set the app to use Wi-Fi only for images in settings if it helps.

input: customer support: cannot remove a saved address
output: If an address is used in a pending order it cannot be deleted. Complete the order and try again.

input: customer support: I want to exchange for different color but same size
output: That's possible! Initiate an exchange and select the new color. It will be shipped once the pickup is done.

input: customer support: I am unable to verify my email
output: Please check spam for the verification link. If not received, you can resend the verification email from settings.

input: customer support: what is the cut-off time for same day delivery
output: Same day delivery orders must be placed before 11 AM. Check product page for availability in your area.

input: customer support: I received a damaged outer box but product fine
output: Thank you for letting us know. The product is covered, but we'll note the packaging issue for future improvement.

input: customer support: can I exchange a product bought with reward points
output: Yes, exchange is allowed. If the value differs, the difference may be adjusted via refund or additional payment.

input: customer support: my refund is on hold
output: A hold may occur if more verification is needed. Please share your order ID so I can check the reason.

input: customer support: I forgot to apply coupon at checkout
output: Unfortunately a coupon cannot be applied after order. You could cancel and reorder if still possible.

input: customer support: app not opening at all today
output: That's frustrating. Please try restarting your device and clearing the app cache. If not resolved, reinstall.

input: customer support: how to connect to live agent
output: I can connect you. Just tell me your issue and order ID, and I'll transfer you to the next available agent.

input: customer support: what is the return policy for electronics
output: Electronics have a 7-10 day return policy if defective or not as described. Check specific product page.

input: customer support: I want to speak to a manager
output: I understand. Let me escalate your concern. A supervisor will reach out to you shortly.

input: customer support: I am not able to add product to cart
output: I apologize for the inconvenience. Please try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache. If the issue persists, try using the app.

input: customer support: website shows 'Access Denied'
output: This might be due to a temporary IP block. Try using a different network or wait for 15 minutes and try again.

input: customer support: I cannot remove items from cart
output: Sorry for the trouble. Try updating the quantity to zero or clicking the delete icon. A page refresh may also help.

input: customer support: cart automatically becomes empty
output: Items in cart may expire if not reserved. Please add them again and check your internet connection.

input: customer support: my order was delivered but I got only one item out of three
output: Your order may have been split into multiple shipments. Please check your email for other tracking details.

input: customer support: I need to reschedule delivery to next week
output: You can reschedule via the tracking link if the option is available. Otherwise, contact the courier partner directly.

input: customer support: the delivery person left my parcel outside
output: We are sorry for that. Delivery partners are instructed to hand over the package directly. We'll raise this with the courier.

input: customer support: tracking shows delivered but I was out of town
output: Please check if a neighbor or family member accepted it. If not, we'll open a missing parcel case.

input: customer support: I want to change the shipping from standard to express
output: Once the order is placed, the shipping speed cannot be upgraded. You may cancel and re-order with express shipping.

input: customer support: my package has been 'out for delivery' since morning
output: Usually delivery happens by end of day. If not received by 9 PM, the courier will attempt the next working day.

input: customer support: the delivery guy is not picking up my call
output: I apologize. You can contact the courier's customer care for immediate assistance. I can also share the number.

input: customer support: I received someone else's parcel
output: This shouldn't have happened. Please share the tracking number on the box, and we'll arrange collection and correct delivery.

input: customer support: I want to cancel an order that is already shipped
output: Once shipped, cancellation isn't possible. You can refuse delivery or initiate a return after receiving it.

input: customer support: why is my delivery late due to 'operational issues'
output: Operational issues like weather or strikes can cause delays. Your order is still on the way; tracking will update soon.

input: customer support: will my package be safe if I'm not home
output: If no one is available, couriers usually attempt three times before returning. You can provide alternate delivery instructions.

input: customer support: refund initiated but showing wrong amount
output: I'm sorry for the error. Please share your order ID so we can verify the refund breakdown and correct it.

input: customer support: I returned a product but refund is half of what I paid
output: Partial refunds might include deduction for shipping or opened packaging. I can check the exact reason for you.

input: customer support: refund to my expired card
output: Banks usually still accept refunds on expired cards. If not credited, contact your bank. We'll also provide refund reference to help.

input: customer support: cash on delivery refund is very slow
output: COD refunds require bank account details. Please make sure you have updated the correct account number and IFSC in the returns request.

input: customer support: my UPI refund failed
output: UPI refunds are usually successful. If failed, the refund may be reattempted or processed to your bank account. Please share your order ID.

input: customer support: I selected refund to wallet but want bank transfer now
output: Once processed, the refund mode cannot be changed. Wallet balance can be used for future purchases.

input: customer support: I haven't got refund after 10 days
output: That's beyond the standard timeframe. Let me escalate this. Please provide your refund reference number.

input: customer support: my product stop working after a week
output: Sorry to hear that. If it's within the return window, you can claim refund or replacement. After that, warranty applies.

input: customer support: the exchange pickup person didn't bring the new item
output: Exchange items are usually shipped after the return pickup is complete. You'll receive tracking for the new item separately.

input: customer support: I want to exchange a product I bought last month
output: Exchange is only allowed within 7 days of delivery. Beyond that, please check if the product has warranty service.

input: customer support: received size XL instead of L
output: I apologize for sending the wrong size. You can request an exchange for the correct size L immediately.

input: customer support: the exchanged product price is less than original
output: If the exchange item is cheaper, the price difference will be refunded to your original payment method.

input: customer support: I got replacement but still defective
output: We take quality seriously. Please share images and we will arrange a full refund or a different product this time.

input: customer support: I lost my return pickup receipt
output: No worries. The pickup is still recorded in our system using your order ID. You can track it online.

input: customer support: can I return a product without the tag
output: Tags must be intact for returns in most categories. If the tag was removed, our team will assess eligibility upon pickup.

input: customer support: how to know if my pincode is serviceable
output: Enter your pincode on the product page or at the cart. It will show if delivery is available to your area.

input: customer support: I need to change my mobile number for OTP
output: You can update your mobile number from account settings after verifying with your email and existing OTP.

input: customer support: I received a 'payment failed' message but bank shows deduction
output: This is a pending transaction. It will be reversed within 48 hours if the order did not go through.

input: customer support: I want to pay with two cards
output: Currently, we only support payment with a single card or payment method per order.

input: customer support: the 'Buy Now' button is not working
output: Try refreshing the page or using the app. If the issue continues, the product may be temporarily out of stock.

input: customer support: how to use my credit note
output: If you have a credit note, the amount auto-applies at checkout when you use the same account. Check your credits section.

input: customer support: I can't find my downloaded invoice
output: Invoices are stored in your order history. Go to the specific order and click 'Download Invoice' again.

input: customer support: why was my order split even though I requested single delivery
output: Orders from different sellers or warehouses may ship separately automatically for faster delivery.

input: customer support: my return got approved but pickup not scheduled
output: After approval, you need to manually schedule a pickup slot from the returns page. Please check there.

input: customer support: I want to exchange an item for a higher priced variant
output: Exchange is only for items of equal or lower price. For a higher priced variant, please return and place a new order.

input: customer support: the app keeps asking me to log in again
output: This may happen due to a session timeout or app update. Please log in again and enable 'Remember Me' if available.

input: customer support: I received a product with a missing charger
output: We apologize. If the charger is part of the box contents, we can send the missing item or arrange a replacement.

input: customer support: I want to check if my area has next-day delivery
output: Next-day delivery depends on the product and your pincode. It will be displayed on the product page before checkout.

input: customer support: I placed an order but no SMS confirmation
output: Please check if your mobile number was correct. SMS may be delayed; you can also check order status in your account.

input: customer support: can I use an international card for payment
output: Yes, we accept international cards. If declined, please enable international transactions through your bank.

input: customer support: my refund was issued to a closed bank account
output: If the account is closed, the refund usually bounces back to us. We will contact you to arrange an alternate refund.

input: customer support: how to apply for a replacement under warranty
output: Visit the order details, select 'Claim Warranty' and follow the steps. You may need to upload product and defect images.

input: customer support: I want to return a product but the box is slightly damaged
output: Slight damage to outer box is usually acceptable as long as the product and accessories are in original condition.

input: customer support: my order is showing 'cancellation in progress' for too long
output: It usually completes in a few hours. If it's stuck beyond 24 hours, please share your order ID so we can check.

input: customer support: can I get an alert when item comes back in stock
output: Yes, there is a 'Notify Me' button on out-of-stock product pages. Click it and we'll alert you via email/app.

input: customer support: I want to remove a product from my order before shipping
output: Unfortunately, we cannot modify individual items after order is placed. You may need to cancel and reorder.

input: customer support: the product I received has a different serial number
output: Serial numbers can vary. If you're concerned about authenticity, please contact support with images, we'll verify.

input: customer support: I'm moving houses, how to update address for future orders
output: You can edit or add a new address in your account's address book and set it as default for next orders.

input: customer support: I clicked 'Return' but it says item not eligible
output: Some items like intimate wear or perishables are non-returnable. Check the product page. If it should be eligible, contact us.

input: customer support: my bank charged extra fees for transaction
output: We don't charge any extra fees. Some banks may levy cross-border or conversion charges. Please check with your bank.

input: customer support: I want to report a rude delivery person
output: I'm sorry for your experience. Please share the order ID, and we'll escalate the complaint to the courier management.

input: customer support: I can't find my wishlist
output: Ensure you're logged in. On the app, wishlist is usually in the account tab or a heart icon on the top bar.

input: customer support: how do I know if a coupon is applicable on my order
output: Go to the cart, apply the coupon, and it will show if the code is valid and how much discount it provides.

input: customer support: I didn't receive my cashback despite meeting conditions
output: Cashback may take 24-72 hours to process. Please check your wallet or bank statement; if missing, share order details.

input: customer support: the product I want is showing 'not deliverable to this pincode'
output: Some products have location restrictions due to logistics or regulatory issues. You can try with a nearby alternate pincode.

input: customer support: my account got hacked
output: I'm sorry. Please use 'Forgot Password' immediately. Then contact our support team to secure your account and orders.

input: customer support: I have a disability, can delivery be made inside my house
output: We can request special assistance. Please mention this in delivery instructions and we'll forward to the courier partner.

input: customer support: how to get a letter for customs
output: For international orders, we provide necessary commercial invoice. Contact support with your order ID for customs documentation.

input: customer support: my order was marked 'return to sender'
output: This usually happens if delivery failed three times or address was incorrect. We'll refund once it returns to warehouse.

input: customer support: can I purchase a product on phone with a representative
output: We don't support phone-based ordering. Please use our website or app for secure ordering.

input: customer support: I want to change my review from negative to positive
output: You can edit or update your review from your order history. Look for the 'Edit Review' option.

input: customer support: my wallet money disappeared after app update
output: Wallet balance is linked to your account, not the app version. Please check again; if still missing, share your account ID.

input: customer support: how to cancel auto-renewal of membership
output: Go to your membership settings and turn off auto-renewal before the next billing date.

input: customer support: can I use my points and a coupon together
output: Yes, generally you can combine reward points and a coupon, unless the coupon terms exclude other discounts.

input: customer support: I received a call asking to click a link for refund
output: This is a phishing attempt. Never click unknown links. We never ask for personal banking info via call or SMS.

input: customer support: I want to buy an item but listing says 'seller contact info'
output: You can contact the seller through the 'Ask a question' button on the product page before placing the order.

input: customer support: what is 'certified refurbished' mean
output: Certified refurbished products are tested and restored to full functionality with a warranty, often with minor cosmetic flaws.

input: customer support: how to get replacement for item damaged during transit
output: If the outer box was damaged, you can request a replacement while accepting the delivery or initiate return later with photos.

input: customer support: can I add gift message after order placed
output: Gift message cannot be added after the order is placed. If it's not yet shipped, you can try canceling and reordering.

input: customer support: my debit card got blocked after payment attempt
output: We don't block cards. Your bank might have flagged the transaction for security. Please contact your bank directly.

input: customer support: how to use a promotional credit
output: Promotional credits appear at checkout automatically if eligible. You'll see a 'Apply Credits' option.

input: customer support: I want to return a product but courier not available in my location
output: If return pickup is unavailable, you can self-ship the product via any courier and we'll reimburse the shipping after verification.

input: customer support: the app is not showing my order history
output: You might be logged in with a different account. Please check the email or phone number. Guest orders won't appear.

input: customer support: my exchange request got canceled automatically
output: It might have been canceled due to stock unavailability or a system error. Please initiate a new request or choose a refund.

input: customer support: I got an email saying 'order on hold' for verification
output: Sometimes high-value orders are flagged for manual verification. Please respond to the email or contact chat support to verify.

input: customer support: I want to receive SMS updates instead of email
output: You can change communication preferences in your account settings to receive SMS notifications.

input: customer support: can I exchange a product I bought from a different store
output: We only handle exchanges for products purchased on our platform. Please contact the original retailer.

input: customer support: the price increased while I was adding to cart
output: Prices are dynamic. The price at the time of order placement is final. Adding to cart does not lock the price.

input: customer support: I pressed 'Cancel' by mistake, please undo
output: If the cancellation hasn't been processed yet, we can try to stop it. Please share your order ID immediately.

input: customer support: app not displaying product images properly
output: This can be a connectivity issue. Try on Wi-Fi or clear app cache from settings. The next update should fix rendering.

input: customer support: I want to order but the website is blocked in my office network
output: Try using mobile data or our app. You can also try incognito mode. It's a network restriction, not a site issue.

input: customer support: what does 'fulfilled by platform' guarantee
output: It means the product is stored and shipped from our warehouse with faster delivery and assured quality checks.

input: customer support: can I have my order delivered to a locker
output: Pickup lockers are available in selected cities. Choose 'Pickup at a nearby location' during checkout if available.

input: customer support: I received duplicate items in my order
output: If you were not charged for the duplicate, it's likely an error. Please return the extra item and we'll assist.

input: customer support: I want to know the expiry date of my wallet cashback
output: Check your wallet section; it shows the date of expiry for each credit. Once expired, it cannot be renewed.

input: customer support: how to report a phishing site pretending to be you
output: Thank you for your vigilance. Please forward the suspicious link to our official phishing report email and we'll take action.

input: customer support: I got a delivery but the seal was broken
output: If the product seal was broken, do not accept the delivery. Insist on noting it with the delivery person. Contact us for return.

input: customer support: my order was placed twice, please combine them
output: We cannot combine two separate orders. But we can cancel one if it's still possible, leaving the other to be shipped.

input: customer support: I want to donate my loyalty points
output: At the moment, there's no option to donate points. They can be redeemed only on purchases.

input: customer support: can I return an item if I just don't like it
output: Returns for 'change of mind' are allowed within the return window for most items, as long as the product is unopened/unused.

input: customer support: I need to complain about a seller
output: Please go to your order details, click 'Report seller', and provide the issue description. Our marketplace team will review.

input: customer support: can you tell me the status of my complaint
output: Sure, share your complaint reference number and I'll check the latest update from our backend.

input: customer support: who is the prime minister of canada
output: I can only help with e-commerce related support queries such as orders, refunds and exchanges.

input: customer support: what is the stock market index today
output: I am only trained to handle customer support requests related to e-commerce services.

input: customer support: can you fix my computer
output: I can only assist with order related queries. Please ask about your orders or payments.
